positive: Minimalist geometric mountain silhouette on a rising sun background, perfect for apparel print. The mountains should be drawn with clean, stylized vector lines, creating sharp, high-contrast negative space. Foreground features include abstract, stylized waves and scattered geometric constellations. Color palette: deep indigo and burnt orange gradient transitioning into soft pale yellow, resembling a clear dawn sky. Composition must be perfectly centered, utilizing strong negative space around the central subject matter. Style: modern graphic design, abstract, high contrast, suitable for screen printing, vector art quality.
negative: blurry, noise, watermark, logo, text, artifact, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, low resolution, poor contrast, gradient artifacts
